title: Image-OCR GLM-OCR Primary Integration
summary: Invert the existing image-ocr skill engine priority so GLM-OCR (Z.AI dedicated OCR model) becomes the primary engine, demoting Gemini 2.5 Flash to secondary and keeping Tesseract as offline last resort. Additive change to ocr_extract.py: new extract_glmocr()/run_glmocr() via raw httpx, Pillow format conversion + downscale for non-native/oversized inputs, reordered auto cascade. Resolves the Gemini monthly-cap outage documented in track 20260614-image-ocr-skill. ZAI_API_KEY already placed in ~/.config/opencode/.env.
keyOutcomes: GLM-OCR as Tier 1 primary in ocr_extract.py (raw httpx, Bearer auth, md_results parsing)
Pillow auto-conversion of GIF/WEBP/BMP/TIFF to PNG + LANCZOS downscale for >10MB images
Reordered auto cascade: GLM-OCR -> Gemini -> Tesseract
--engine accepts glmocr explicitly; --no-fallback stops after primary
SKILL.md and reference.md updated to document the 3-tier cascade and ZAI_API_KEY
No regression to existing Gemini/Tesseract tiers
risks: ZAI_API_KEY not in process env until opencode restart (live test gated on restart; shape/encode tests run without key)
Edit-tool Bun-is-not-defined in build env (mitigated with PowerShell Select-String + literal [string]::Replace fallback per task)
Python indentation break on insertion (mitigated with ast.parse syntax checks and --help smoke test)
dependencies: Python packages: httpx (>=0.28), Pillow (>=10) -- both already installed
ZAI_API_KEY env var, loaded from ~/.config/opencode/.env (already placed)
blocking: Live GLM-OCR validation tasks 4.4 and 4.5 deferred: requires opencode restart to load ZAI_API_KEY into the process env. After restart, re-run: python ~/.opencode-lazy-vault/image-ocr/scripts/ocr_extract.py <test_image> --engine glmocr --output-dir <dir>
relatedTracks: 20260614-image-ocr-skill (completed -- built the skill being modified here)
validationCriteria: python ocr_extract.py --help shows glmocr in --engine choices
encode_for_glmocr produces valid data:image URIs for PNG and GIF inputs
Live GLM-OCR test (post-restart) produces .md with engine: glm-ocr in frontmatter
Explicit --engine gemini and --engine tesseract still run without Python traceback
SKILL.md and reference.md document the 3-tier cascade and ZAI_API_KEY
